hero.title: EMI / Loan Calculator
hero.description: Estimate loan repayments, compare scenarios, save private planning records, and review reducing-balance amortization schedules.

flow.title: Calculate → Save → Compare → Review
steps: Enter loan amount, rate, duration, fees, currency, and optional extra monthly payment.
Review EMI, total interest, repayment total, payoff estimate, and amortization schedule.
Save private scenarios, compare alternatives, and inspect aggregate insights.

differences.title: Loan estimates without lender promises
differences.description: EMI / Loan Calculator helps users understand repayment scenarios without offering lender rates, approvals, credit scoring, or regulated financial advice.

items.title: Calculate
items.description: Use standard reducing-balance EMI math, including zero-interest handling, fees, extra payments, and payoff estimates.

items.title: Save
items.description: Store owner-scoped loan scenarios with calculated EMI, interest, repayment, payoff date, and timestamps.

items.title: Compare
items.description: Compare saved and temporary scenarios by EMI, total interest, repayment total, duration, payoff date, and extra-payment savings.

feel.title: Clear repayment planning in one private workspace
feel.description: The app keeps loan calculations understandable, repeatable, and separate from bank integrations.

items.title: Transparent
items.description: Every calculation exposes principal, interest, total repayment, and installment-level balance movement.

items.title: Private
items.description: Saved scenarios are authenticated and owner-scoped.

items.title: Planning-only
items.description: The product clearly states that actual repayments, fees, rates, and lender terms may differ.

audiences.title: Who uses EMI / Loan Calculator
audiences.description: Built for people who want to compare repayment scenarios before or after speaking with a lender.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Estimate monthly payments and total interest for personal, vehicle, education, or household loans.

items.title: Families
items.description: Compare affordability and payoff timelines before discussing shared commitments.

items.title: Small business owners
items.description: Review planning scenarios for equipment, working capital, or asset purchases without creating lender records.

resourceSection.title: EMI / Loan Calculator essentials
resourceSection.description: V1 focuses on deterministic repayment planning and avoids regulated lending scope.

items.title: Calculator
items.description: Calculate EMI, interest, repayment, fees, payoff date, ratio, and schedule.

items.title: Saved Loans
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, delete, search, and revisit owner-scoped scenarios.

items.title: Compare and Insights
items.description: Compare repayment outcomes and review aggregate saved-scenario statistics.

groupedSection.title: From estimate to decision support
groupedSection.description: Move from a single calculation toward scenario review without leaving the Ansiversa shell.

items.name: EMI
items.description: Estimate the regular monthly repayment using reducing-balance math.

items.name: Schedule
items.description: Inspect each installment's interest, principal, extra payment, and closing balance.

items.name: Saved scenarios
items.description: Keep named loan plans available for later comparison.

items.name: Insights
items.description: See aggregate principal, projected interest, and EMI range across saved records.

technicalSection.title: Built within the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: EMI / Loan Calculator follows the shared mini-app architecture and keeps financial planning boundaries explicit.
items: Protected workflow routes for Calculator, Saved Loans, Compare, and Insights.
Owner-scoped API mounted at /api/v1/emi-loan-calculator with an isolated app database.
Overview Explore CTAs route directly into /emi-loan-calculator/calculator.

finalCta.title: Open EMI / Loan Calculator
finalCta.description: Start with the calculator and save scenarios only when you want to revisit them.
